entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: Pennisetum glaucum L., a cereal crop grown in semi-arid regions

entities.name: NIGERIA
entities.description: Country where the field experiments were conducted

entities.name: MINJIBIR
entities.description: A specific location in Nigeria used for field experiments

entities.name: GAMBAWA
entities.description: A specific location in Nigeria used for field experiments

entities.name: PLANT POPULATION
entities.description: The density of plants per unit area, measured in hills per hectare

entities.name: SEMI-ARID ENVIRONMENTS
entities.description: Environmental conditions characterized by low rainfall and high evaporation

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The amount of grain produced per unit area

entities.name: STALK YIELD
entities.description: The amount of stalk biomass produced per unit area

entities.name: DAYS TO 50% FLOWERING
entities.description: The number of days from sowing until 50% of the plants flower

entities.name: PLANT CHLOROPHYLL CONTENT
entities.description: The amount of chlorophyll in the plant, measured by SPAD

entities.name: LEAF AREA INDEX
entities.description: The ratio of total upper leaf surface of a crop to the surface area of the land on which the crop grows

entities.name: FIELD EXPERIMENTS
entities.description: The research method used to evaluate the response of pearl millet varieties

entities.name: SOSAT-C88
entities.description: A specific variety of pearl millet

entities.name: GB8765
entities.description: A specific variety of pearl millet

entities.name: LOCAL VARIETY
entities.description: The indigenous variety of pearl millet used as a control
